## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## UI / i18n checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] ES/EN/GL strings are aligned
- [ ] No new hardcoded user-facing strings
- [ ] Screenshots/GIF included for visible changes

## Backend / DB checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] SQL migration included
- [ ] RLS/policies reviewed
- [ ] Backward compatibility checked

## Notes for reviewers

Any extra context, tradeoffs, or known follow-ups.
